news.title: Anthropic Executives Visit LDP Headquarters for Talks on AI Security Cooperation
news.description: Executives from U.S.-based AI company Anthropic, which developed the artificial intelligence system "Claude Mythos" that has raised concerns over potential misuse in cyberattacks, visited the headquarters of Japan's ruling Liberal Democratic Party on May 16th…

news.title: Anger Management Is Getting Mindfully Guided Via Generative AI Such As ChatGPT
news.description: Generative AI such as ChatGPT and other LLMs can be helpful for dealing with anger issues. I give tips and insights on how to best use AI for this. An AI Insider scoop.

news.title: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said his company will likely spend $300M on Anthropic tokens
news.description: Salesforce CEO Marc Benioff said he's able to work faster with AI agents and that the company is working on tech to make coding easier at Slack.

news.title: Kevin O'Leary pushes back on Tucker Carlson's data center concerns: 'Welcome to America, buddy!'
news.description: Kevin O'Leary defended his AI data center in Utah, despite Tucker Carlson's concerns about taxpayer subsidies, during a debate on America's AI future.
